violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the storage area and near the candy/greenhouse area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
The 3-bay faucet was observed with a continuous leak. System shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Various raw product was observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All product was relocated to walk-in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The door to the outside, located in the storage area and near the candy/greenhouse area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The open air unit was observed not able to hold foods at 41 degrees or below. Product was relocated. Unit to not be used until serviced. PIC stated routine service was scheduled earlier this week. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
The 3-bay faucet was observed with a continuous leak. System shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per PIC, establishment will have an employee fill out application. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bathroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was filled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
Mold was observed on several strawberries on sale. PIC started disposal before count could be made. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
Various foods were observed stored on the floor in the various locations. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
The condensate from the refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
